name: Korean Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
This is a recipe for Korean Short Ribs, Kal Bi. Combine all the ingredients into a pan and marinate up to about 4 to 5 lbs of beef short ribs. Marinate at least 2 hours, preferably overnight.
The ribs can be left whole or they can be English cut by the butcher or market. Authentic Korean style is to slice very carefully and thinly while "unrolling" the rib as you go. If done correctly, you'll end up with a strip of meat the width of the bone x about 6-9 inches long of uniform thickness with the bone still attached by the cartilage or membrane on the bone.
Grill over hot coals quickly to achieve medium rare. Serve with white steamed rice and an oriental salad or veggie side dish. It's a quick and easy meal, perfect for BBQ with friends. For those living in Maui, fresh ribs are available daily at Azeki's Meat Market, Kihei. They can also be frozen and shipped ahead of time for travel to destinations like Chicago or SFO without issue.
